videos.title: TXL NXTPAPER 70 Pro UNBOXING and Hands ON
videos.description:
If you are a PRO user on your phone with screen on time for more than 6 hours - you have to check out the new TCL USA NXTPAPER 70 Pro that has a paper like display. 

It is the BEST phone on the market for combating eye fatigue with a natural light display, reflection free view and blue light purification. It also has 3 display modes you can toggle on (Ink Modes) if you are an eBook reader!

CHECK IT HERE: https://us.tcl.com/products/nxtpaper-70-pro?srsltid=AfmBOooU2qiFHK8_QPvK3a2Bq_hzTiFO2YeJ_m
